compiled_state.title: [per-worktree-review]: reviewer-findings.json written to orchestrator ARTIFACTS_DIR instead of worktree ARTIFACTS_DIR
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
When running per-worktree serial review (worktree.isolation_enabled=true), the review sub-agent is dispatched WITHOUT isolation (per REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md rule). This causes get_artifacts_dir() to hash the orchestrator's REPO_ROOT, writing reviewer-findings.json to the orchestrator's artifacts dir. But record-review.sh and the pre-commit review gate run in the worktree context and look for findings in the worktree's artifacts dir (different hash).

## Reproduction
1. Enable worktree.isolation_enabled=true
2. Dispatch implementation sub-agent with isolation:worktree
3. After sub-agent returns, run REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md in worktree context
4. Review agent writes findings to /tmp/workflow-plugin-<orchestrator-hash>/
5. record-review.sh looks in /tmp/workflow-plugin-<worktree-hash>/ — file not found

## Workaround
Manually copy reviewer-findings.json from orchestrator artifacts dir to worktree artifacts dir before calling record-review.sh.

## Suggested Fix
Either pass ARTIFACTS_DIR explicitly to the review agent prompt so it writes to the correct location, or have record-review.sh accept a --findings-path override.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Note: related fixes already landed — 28c4-3fed (overlap check skip for --findings-file), 6361-9c5b (cross-worktree skip), f518-bba6 (harvest-worktree uses --attest mode). Investigating whether the root cause is still reachable.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation complete: Bug is fully mitigated through 3 defense-in-depth layers: (1) per-worktree-review-commit.md instructs WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR export, (2) record-review.sh skips overlap check for --findings-file override, (3) harvest-worktree.sh uses --attest mode bypassing findings pipeline. No remaining code path exposes the original bug. Closing as already-fixed.
comments.author: Test
